landing.terms_agree: By continuing you agree to our

maak.intro:
I'm Määk.
I'm here with you, while we find someone who really fits.
maak.guide: I'll guide you calmly through this.
maak.waiting: I'm here while we wait. Good things take time.
maak.firstMatch: I told you it was worth the wait. 💛

maak_moment_of_depth.lines_02: Schrödinger's cat exists in two states at once.
maak_moment_of_depth.lines_06: And it's exactly where modern dating lives today.
maak_moment_of_depth.lines_10: But nothing real. Because nothing becomes real…
maak_moment_of_depth.lines_13: At MÄÄK, we don't chase more options.
maak_moment_of_depth.lines_14: We help you discover what's real - one interaction at a time.
maak_moment_of_depth.lines_15: It's about the moment you decide to show up.

maak_matching_story.title: How MÄÄK matches you
maak_matching_story.body_1: Your answers map how you connect-not an endless feed, but a thoughtful daily shortlist tailored to you.
maak_matching_story.body_2: We use personality dimensions and compatibility signals to decide who can appear in your match pool.
maak_matching_story.body_3: Less noise, more intention. Finish the test so we can match you with care.

maak_narrative_variants.matches_ready_body: You waited with intention. Now you can see who's there-one interaction at a time.
maak_narrative_variants.first_match_quote: Told you it was worth the wait. 💛
maak_narrative_variants.chat_empty_body: …until you start the conversation. Send a line that feels true to you.
maak_narrative_variants.icebreaker_intro: Real connections start with one message. Pick a suggestion or write your own.
maak_narrative_variants.landing_hero_line: We don't chase more options-we help you discover what becomes real, one conversation at a time.

waiting_phase.first_match_title: Your first match is on the way!
waiting_phase.first_match_subtitle: We're preparing your personal matches based on your personality.
waiting_phase.tip_1_desc: We look for someone who fits you-not just someone like you
waiting_phase.tip_2_desc: Good matches take a little time
waiting_phase.tip_3_desc: You can get to know yourself better in the meantime
waiting_phase.footer_tip: While you wait, add more to your profile-at your own pace.

matches.edge_auth_step2: In the project folder: supabase link --project-ref jappgthiyedycwhttpcu and npm run edge:fix-401 (deploys match-status and match-daily).
matches.edge_auth_step3: Ensure .env has VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY from the same project as in the Supabase Dashboard.

ISTJ.title: The Logistician

ISFJ.title: The Defender
ISFJ.description: Dedicated and warm protector, always ready to defend loved ones.

ESTJ.title: The Executive
ESTJ.description: Excellent administrator; unsurpassed at managing things or people.

ESFJ.title: The Consul

ISTP.title: The Virtuoso

ESTP.title: The Entrepreneur

ESFP.title: The Entertainer
ESFP.description: Spontaneous, energetic and enthusiastic - life of the party.

about.title: About MÄÄK
about.intro: MÄÄK is Sweden's smartest dating app with AI-driven personality matching. We help singles find someone who truly fits based on personality, values and communication.
about.placeholder: Take our 30-question personality test, get daily matches and start meaningful conversations with icebreakers that suit you.

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Find your perfect match based on personality
onboarding.ready_description: You're ready to start matching with others based on your personality

personality_test_questions.q1: I recharge by spending time with other people
personality_test_questions.q2: I'm at my best in large groups and social settings
personality_test_questions.q3: I readily start conversations with new people
personality_test_questions.q4: I prefer to talk through my thoughts with others
personality_test_questions.q5: I get energized from taking part in group discussions
personality_test_questions.q6: I actively seek out social events and parties
personality_test_questions.q7: I focus on concrete facts rather than abstract ideas
personality_test_questions.q8: I trust my experience more than my imagination
personality_test_questions.q9: I prefer practical solutions over theoretical ones
personality_test_questions.q10: I notice details more than the big picture
personality_test_questions.q11: I'm comfortable with routines and tried-and-true methods
personality_test_questions.q12: I'd rather live in the present than dream about the future
personality_test_questions.q13: I make decisions based on logic rather than feelings
personality_test_questions.q14: I value honesty even if it might hurt
personality_test_questions.q15: I weigh pros and cons carefully
personality_test_questions.q16: I stay objective in conflict situations
personality_test_questions.q18: I question decisions based only on emotions
personality_test_questions.q19: I prefer to have a clear plan for the future
personality_test_questions.q20: I'm comfortable with structure and deadlines
personality_test_questions.q21: I like to finish tasks before starting new ones
personality_test_questions.q24: I get stressed by last-minute changes
personality_test_questions.q25: I feel confident in myself in most situations
personality_test_questions.q26: I don't let others' opinions affect my self-image
personality_test_questions.q27: I handle stress and setbacks without much worry
personality_test_questions.q28: I'm happy with who I am
personality_test_questions.q30: I don't need validation from others to feel good

terms.mobile_summary: Here is a short summary. Full terms of use and privacy policy with all sections are available via the button below (opens in the browser).

reporting.mobile_body: Reporting and guidelines are described in detail on the website. In the mobile app you will soon be able to manage reports directly here.
reporting.policy_intro: Our approach to user reports and community safety.
reporting.policy_s1_body:
Users can report inappropriate behaviour from the profile menu, chat menu, or Settings → Report a problem.

The form requires: violation type (harassment, hate speech, fraud, nudity, spam, fake profile, etc.), context and evidence (screenshots or messages can be attached), and an optional witness statement.

Reports are categorised by severity:
• Low: mild misconduct (e.g. minor rudeness)
• Medium: concerning behaviour (e.g. persistent unwanted messages)
• High: serious violations (e.g. threats, sexual harassment, hate crimes, explicit content)
reporting.policy_s2_body:
A trained moderator reviews each report manually within 24 hours.

The process may include conversation history (where relevant), attached evidence, prior reports about the same user, and verification status.

While a case is open, the reported user may be temporarily restricted from new messages or matches; the profile may be marked as under review internally.
reporting.policy_s3_body:
For the reporter:
• Immediate confirmation that the report was received
• Follow-up within 48 hours while under review
• Final outcome when appropriate

For the reported user:
• Minor issues: warning and guidance on community rules
• Serious cases: notice of suspension or permanent removal, with reasons and which rule was broken
reporting.policy_s4_body:
Depending on severity and history:
• Warning (first-time, low severity)
• Temporary suspension (7-30 days for medium cases)
• Permanent removal (serious or repeated violations)
• Escalation to authorities when a crime is suspected, in line with Swedish law

Other steps may include removing content, revoking verification, or blocking payments if fraud is suspected.
reporting.policy_s5_body:
Users who received a sanction may appeal within 14 days. A different moderator handles the appeal. Decision within 72 hours.

If the appeal is upheld, sanctions may be reduced or reversed and access restored.
If rejected, you receive a reasoned response; further appeal is only in exceptional cases.
reporting.policy_s6_body: We analyse report trends monthly, train moderators regularly, and improve reporting flows based on feedback. We may use assisted flagging of harmful language as a complement to human review-not a replacement.
reporting.policy_s7_body: You can see the status of your reports under Report history in Settings. We publish summaries of significant safety or policy changes to the community when needed.
reporting.policy_s8_body: We have clear procedures for cooperation with Swedish authorities when required. Data is retained for legal processes in accordance with Swedish law. Anonymised data may be shared for serious crime-prevention purposes only when appropriate.
reporting.commitment_body: We strive for a safe, respectful dating environment. Every report is taken seriously and handled with discretion, fairness and the community’s wellbeing in mind.

welcome.subtitle: Your profile is ready. Here's what awaits you.
welcome.feature_1_desc: Every day you get new matches based on your personality

age.hint: You must be at least 20 years old to use MÄÄK
age.too_young: You must be at least 20 years old to create an account.

id_verify.title: Get Verified
id_verify.body: In the web app you can upload ID for extra safety. In the mobile app this is coming soon - you can skip and continue.
id_verify.body_updated: Verify your identity with a selfie. It takes less than a minute and helps keep MÄÄK safe for everyone.

verification.intro_point1_desc: Take a quick selfie to confirm your identity.
verification.intro_point2_desc: By verifying you help ensure everyone on MÄÄK is real.
verification.intro_point3_desc: It's never shared on your profile or with your matches.
verification.tip1_desc: A clear photo without other people makes verification easier.
verification.tip2_title: We want you as you are
verification.tip2_desc: This selfie check doesn't require matching your hairstyle or makeup from your profile photos.
verification.camera_hint: Position your face inside the oval
verification.camera_not_available: Camera requires a development build. Not available in Expo Go.
verification.camera_permission_body: MÄÄK needs camera access to take your verification selfie.
verification.pending_body: Your selfie is being reviewed. This usually takes less than 24 hours. You'll see a verified badge on your profile once approved.
verification.already_verified_body: Your account is confirmed. Verification is complete and does not need to be redone.
verification.how_body_1: Our face recognition technology compares your face in your video selfie with the photos in your profile. We keep three screenshots from the video selfie as long as the account exists to review and manage our selfie verification feature. We will also save the results of the process (verified or not).
verification.how_body_2: We don't keep any information or "template" for face recognition after the selfie verification process (which is usually done within 24 hours). We don't keep your video selfie. Learn more about how it works.
verification.how_link: Learn more about how it works here.
verification.consent_body: We use tools to measure how many people we reach and how our app is used, to customize ads, improve our marketing activities, enable social features, and improve our understanding of how our services are used overall. These tools do not track you across different apps or websites.
verification.upload_error_body: We couldn’t send your selfie. Check your connection and try again.

photo.permission_body: Allow photo library access to upload images.
photo.video_too_long_body: Maximum video length is {{max}} seconds. Choose a shorter clip.
photo.video_too_large_body: Maximum file size is {{max}} MB. Try a shorter or lower quality video.
photo.upload_error_body: The file could not be read. Please try again or pick a different file.

phone_errors.network: Network error. Check your internet connection and that Supabase is configured correctly.
phone_errors.config_env: Configuration error: Supabase environment variables are missing. Check apps/mobile .env.
phone_errors.not_configured: Supabase is not configured. Add EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to apps/mobile/.env.
phone_errors.captcha: SMS sign-in requires CAPTCHA in your Supabase settings. Turn off CAPTCHA for Phone Auth or implement captchaToken in the client.
phone_errors.phone_disabled: SMS sign-in is not enabled in Supabase. Go to Dashboard → Authentication → Providers → Phone.
phone_errors.phone_signups_disabled: Phone is enabled but new sign-ups via SMS are disabled. In Dashboard → Authentication → Providers → Phone, allow new users, or sign in with an existing account.
phone_errors.twilio_auth_failed: Twilio rejected authentication (error 20003). In Supabase: Authentication → Providers → Phone - verify Account SID and Auth Token match Twilio Console (no extra spaces). Regenerate the Auth Token if it was rotated.
phone_errors.not_configured_short: Supabase is not configured. Add .env for sign-in.
phone_errors.code_expired: The code has expired. Send a new code and try again.
